context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct ElevenLabs REST API endpoint, proper authentication header, valid output format identifiers, correct duration parameter constraints, and descriptive prompts when building a shell-based pipeline.

checklist.name: Correct auth header
checklist.description: Uses the xi-api-key header (not Authorization: Bearer or other schemes) for authentication

checklist.name: Environment variable for key
checklist.description: References $ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable for the API key value, does not hardcode a key

checklist.name: Content-Type header
checklist.description: Includes Content-Type: application/json header in the cURL request

checklist.name: Text field in body
checklist.description: The JSON request body includes a 'text' field with the prompt

checklist.name: Duration in body
checklist.description: The JSON request body includes 'duration_seconds' field

checklist.name: Valid output formats
checklist.description: Output formats used in config are valid ElevenLabs format strings (e.g., mp3_44100_128, opus_48000_128, pcm_44100, etc.) -- not invented format names

checklist.name: Output format passed
checklist.description: The output_format is passed as a query parameter in the URL or in the request body/parameters

checklist.name: Descriptive prompts
checklist.description: Sound effect prompts in the config are specific and descriptive (more than 2 words, describing the sound in detail)

checklist.name: Valid duration range
checklist.description: All specified durations are between 0.5 and 30 seconds

checklist.name: POST method
checklist.description: Uses POST method (not GET or other) for the cURL request
